description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a sloped terrain, featuring a striking geometric roof pattern composed of alternating light and dark triangles. The structure is primarily rectangular with large glass windows running along the longer facade, allowing for ample natural light and panoramic views. The exterior combines concrete, glass, and metal, with a cantilevered roof providing shade and architectural interest. The building sits atop a landscaped green base, with visible pathways and steps leading to the main entrance. The roof appears flat and slightly overhanging, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, rectangular bungalow with a geometric patterned flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped sloped base. The design features clean lines, concrete and glass materials, and a cantilevered roof.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the geometric roof pattern and the landscaped slope in front.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the main entrance side, with visible steps and pathways leading up to the building and the overhanging roof.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the long facade with extensive glass windows and the full length of the cantilevered roof, emphasizing the open, airy design.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the rear and side of the bungalow, showing the continuation of the geometric roof and the green terrain wrapping around the structure.
